title: debounce() fires N times instead of once
prompt:
src/debounce.ts schedules a timer on every call but never cancels prior timers. Rapid calls fire the wrapped function once per call instead of once at the end.

Fix debounce() so that within a quiet window of waitMs, only the LAST call's args reach the wrapped function. After waitMs of silence, a fresh call should be schedulable again.

The failing tests in tests/target.test.ts must pass. tests/regression.test.ts (single-call firing, args pass-through, pre-fire timing) must continue to pass.

Do not modify the tests. Do not add new files.
